items.title: Seaborn
items.description: Seaborn provides statistical plotting functions (boxplot, pairplot, heatmap defaults) that render through Matplotlib Figure/Axes. Learn Matplotlib first to customize Seaborn outputs at the axes level.

items.title: Choosing chart types
items.description: That topic decides whether a scatter, histogram, or bar fits the analytical question; this topic implements the chosen chart with pyplot and Axes methods.

items.title: Embedding visualization
items.description: Embedding plots (2D scatter of coordinates with metadata encodings) are typically drawn with ax.scatter and legends here; interpretation guardrails and publication practices for embeddings live in the embedding visualization topic.

items.title: Confusion matrix
items.description: Matplotlib imshow or matshow can render a confusion matrix heatmap, but matrix construction, normalization, and metric semantics belong to the confusion matrix topic—use it for evaluation, Matplotlib for the drawing API.
